<!--
Thanks for contributing to Civitas. Please answer the questions below — keep
each section short. The PR description is part of the historical record.
-->

## What

Briefly describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Why

Explain the motivation. If this implements an issue, link it (`Closes #123`).
For substantive changes, link the discussion that informed the design.

## How

Highlight the parts of the diff that benefit from a guided read. If the
change is straightforward, skip this section.

## Tests

- [ ] Existing tests still pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] New tests added where applicable
- [ ] Manual verification (describe what you did)

## Compliance

- [ ] Commits are DCO-signed (`-s`)
- [ ] `make fmt && make lint` is clean
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real PII in code or tests
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior, schema, or interfaces changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything specific reviewers should look at, or alternatives you considered
and rejected.
